errors.description: A hash-only governance evidence record was appended to the immutable attestation ledger.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Only verified append-only records may advance attestation ledger state.

errors.description: Attestation ledger append was blocked because evidence was missing, unsafe, or unverifiable.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Unverifiable evidence must not be added to the ledger.

errors.description: Attestation ledger hash-chain continuity verified from genesis to current head.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Ledger consumers require verified hash-chain continuity.

errors.description: Attestation ledger hash-chain continuity is broken or tampered.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Broken attestation lineage must block further trusted appends.

errors.description: External remote anchor is unavailable; local append-only evidence remains hash-bound but not externally anchored.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Remote anchoring cannot be claimed when unavailable.

errors.description: Ledger evidence policy hash differs from the expected governance policy hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Policy mismatch indicates possible governance drift and blocks trusted append.
